Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial MVP: Agno + FastAPI + Next.js full-stack agent platform

Working end-to-end loop: Next.js UI -> FastAPI proxy -> Agno Agent \(gpt-4o-mini\) -> Supabase Postgres persistence. Includes thread management, SWR polling, approval gate scaffolding, and mobile-first dark UI.

Key fixes from scaffolding: corrected Agno v1.0.1 import paths \(PostgresAgentStorage, AgentMemory wrapper\), URL-encoded DB passwords, extracted getBackendConfig to shared lib, async params for Next.js 16, and persistent message state in ChatStream.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
